scripts.build: npm run optimize-images && esbuild app.jsx icons.jsx components/shared.jsx components/about.jsx components/publications.jsx components/news.jsx components/picture.jsx --outdir=dist --entry-names=[dir]/[name]-[hash] --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=transform --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --target=es2020 --minify --metafile=dist/manifest.json
scripts.watch: esbuild app.jsx icons.jsx components/shared.jsx components/about.jsx components/publications.jsx components/news.jsx components/picture.jsx --outdir=dist --entry-names=[dir]/[name]-[hash] --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=transform --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --target=es2020 --watch --metafile=dist/manifest.json
